zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Hebden於大約1378年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格斯波頓時，她的父親Nicholas Hebdon61歲，母親Katherine de Wyham25歲。她於1395年與Sir Piers Tempest在英國越可爾布拉可維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1438年在英國英格蘭越可爾布拉可維爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Hebden于大约1378年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格斯波頓时，她的父亲Nicholas Hebdon61岁，母亲Katherine de Wyham25岁。她于1395年与Sir Piers Tempest在英国越可爾布拉可維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1438年在英国英格兰越可爾布拉可維爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hebden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hebdon  .

variants.name: Hebdon
meanings: English (Durham and Yorkshire): habitational name from Hebden in Linton (Yorkshire), probably from Old English hēope ‘rose hip’ or hēopa ‘bramble’ + denu ‘valley’. Roger de Mowbray granted the manor of Hebden to Uctred de Hebden, a descendant of Uctred Earl of Northumberland (died 1016), in 1120.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Hebden was born about 1378, in Gosberton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas Hebdon, was 61 and her mother, Katherine de Wyham, was 25. She married Sir Piers Tempest in 1395, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died about 1438, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Hebden est née environ 1378, à Gosberton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Hebdon, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Wyham, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Piers Tempest en 1395, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1438, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Hebden um 1378 in Gosberton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Hebdon 61 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Wyham 25. Sie hat 1395 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England Sir Piers Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1438 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Hebden è nata il circa 1378 nel Gosberton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Nicholas Hebdon, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Katherine de Wyham, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Piers Tempest nel 1395, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1438, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Hebdenが約1378年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴスバートンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Hebdonは61歳，母Katherine de Wyhamは25歳であった。1395年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルでSir Piers Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1438年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Hebden(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 고스버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Hebdon(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Wyham(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 Sir Piers Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Hebden nasceu aproximadamente 1378, em Gosberton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Hebdon, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Wyham, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Piers Tempest em 1395, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1438, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Hebden родилась около 1378 г. в местности госбиртон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas Hebdon было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Wyham, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Piers Tempest в 1395 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1438 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace Hebden nació aproximadamente 1378, en Gosberton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Hebdon, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Katherine de Wyham, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Piers Tempest en 1395, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1438, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
